enemy.name: The Final Lesson
enemy.special: onPlayerChargeWrong: gains permanent +2 Strength. quizPhases: 5 questions at 66% HP (passed), 8 rapid-fire questions at 33% HP (approaching). Enemy at 64% HP, approaching 33% trigger.

hand.name: Lifetap
hand.description: Deal damage. Heal 20% of damage dealt.

hand.name: Emergency
hand.description: Gain block. DOUBLE if HP below 30%. Player at 22.5% HP — doubles!

hand.name: Execute
hand.description: Bonus damage below 30% enemy HP. Enemy at 64% — no bonus.

notes: Final boss. Player critically low at 18 HP. Enemy has Strength 4 from 2 wrong charges (incoming 4×4 hits = potentially 32 total with Strength multiplier). Emergency triggers DOUBLE block at <30% HP (player at 22.5%). Lifetap heals from damage. Reckless at 18 HP is dangerous — 3 self-damage could leave player at 15, then 4 hits from 14+ dmg each = death. Wrong Charge on any card empowers Final Lesson further. This is a desperate final-boss endgame state.
